sys_metadata_link.payload:
true text 89137fd0db4420106a58ef92ca961903 false false false false false 6a0e0e96db4d99501e1792c5d4961956 ddba8256db4d99501e1792c5d496195a Group Members lists the total number of users in the selected Tasker group. Any messages relating to KB0010003 2022-08-03 Group Members Count kb_knowledge rjoy 2022-08-03 20:11:12 global / 587d1212db8d99501e1792c5d496192e 9 csloyer 2022-09-28 10:05:02 25 Group Members lists the total number of users in the selected Tasker group. Any messages relating to the group (such as “The group is missing the role”) appear above the list. You can also add or remove users from the group and edit the group or user records.

  • Adding a user to a group assigns them the Tasker role for the group. For example, adding a user to the Task Administrator group assigns the user the Tasker Task Administrator (TA) role.
  • Removing a user from a group removes the Tasker role (for the group) from the user.

Tip: After enabling and configuring Group Management for your organization, adding a Tasker role to a user’s OU Member record automatically adds them to the Tasker Group.

Adding Group Members

  1. Select the Group Members button for a Tasker role.
  2. Select Open in Platform from the context menu. This opens the ServiceNow Group Members list in a new browser tab.

Note: When “-1” displays in the button it indicates that a group is not selected for the role.

  1. Click New.
  2. Select a User.
  3. Click Submit.
  4. Add any additional users.
  5. Close the tab to return to Tasker.

To use Tasker, in addition to having Tasker role(s), users must be added to a Tasker Organizational Unit (OU). Typically, Organizational Hierarchy Administrators or Global Hierarchy Administrators (or a Tasker Application Administrator) complete this step.

When there are users with Tasker roles explicitly assigned to their member record and not in the Tasker group for that role, the “Users explicitly assigned to role” message displays (and is visible in the Has Role Explicitly list). Selecting “Let’s fix it” assigns these users to the group.

Removing a User From a Group

Removing a user from a Tasker group removes the Tasker role from the ServiceNow user record.

  1. Select Open in platform from the Group Members context menu. This opens the ServiceNow Group Members list in a new browser tab.
  2. Hover on a row and select checkbox(es) for the users you want to remove from the group.
  3. Select Delete from Actions on selected rows and confirm the deletion.
  4. Close the browser tab to return to Tasker. The updated list of users displays.

After removing a user from a Tasker group, they will appear in the Member Table Roles list and the role remains selected on their Tasker member record. However, they will not be able to use the Tasker role.

Selecting “Let’s fix it” on the Member Table Rows list or under the Tasker group to remove the role from the Tasker member record and table.

Editing Groups and Users

Users for the selected group and the group name display in the Group Members list. To edit a group:

  1. Select Open in platform from the Group Members context menu. The Group Members screen displays in a new browser tab.

Tip: Alternatively, select Edit Group from the ellipses menu to the right of a Tasker role. Selecting “Edit Group” opens the Edit Group modal From here, you can update group Information, Group Roles, Group Members, Groups, and Manage Subscriptions.

  1. Select the Group record to open the out of the box ServiceNow Group record. Just like for the Edit Group modal (see above), you can update the Group Name and Description, and more.
  2. Select the tabs, as needed, to update:
    • Group Roles. After selecting a group for a Tasker role, selecting “Add the role now” automatically assigns the Tasker role to the group. As needed, you can also change roles from the Group Roles tab.
    • Group Members. From the Group Members tab, you can add and remove users from the group.
    • Groups (standard ServiceNow Users and Groups functionality).
    • Manage Subscriptions. (standard ServiceNow Users and Groups functionality).

Deleting a Group

  1. Select Open in platform from the Group Members context menu.
  2. Remove all users from the group (as described above). If a group is deleted prior to removing users, users will no longer have the group role. However, the role will still appear on their member record. (So it will appear that they still have the role.)
  3. Select the Group name.
  4. Select Open in platform form the context menu.
  5. Click the Delete button.
]]> General 0 2100-01-01 published #f2f2f3 700000 true image/png Pasted image.png 1b144e96440815c08bc02c8c4d38aaab67815c3e7b310962e40c8823c6d5f30f 399 869 57940 55911 available csloyer 2022-09-22 15:14:50 2a19be52dbc699101e1792c5d49619a4 3 csloyer 2022-09-22 15:14:50 kb_knowledge 587d1212db8d99501e1792c5d496192e  67564 0 2a19be52dbc699101e1792c5d49619a4 csloyer 2022-09-22 15:14:50 6a19be52dbc699101e1792c5d49619a4  6988 1 2a19be52dbc699101e1792c5d49619a4 csloyer 2022-09-22 15:14:50 ea19be52dbc699101e1792c5d49619a4 #eef0f3 700000 true image/png Pasted image.png 33d7e49b855707fc4e816f2eab38ff40532f0153101c447dab73b654120502c6 48 177 2694 2717 available csloyer 2022-09-22 15:14:50 2a19be52dbc699101e1792c5d49619bc 3 csloyer 2022-09-22 15:14:50 kb_knowledge 587d1212db8d99501e1792c5d496192e H4sIAAAAAAAAAA== 16 0 2a19be52dbc699101e1792c5d49619bc csloyer 2022-09-22 15:14:50 6a19be52dbc699101e1792c5d49619bc  3612 1 2a19be52dbc699101e1792c5d49619bc csloyer 2022-09-22 15:14:50 ea19be52dbc699101e1792c5d49619bc #eef0f1 700000 true image/png Pasted image.png 5681abba7405cca2b4376ea948805ef56346e3493fb7524498456c5d3a9d8f6f 244 166 9450 9344 available csloyer 2022-09-22 15:14:50 2e19b292dbc699101e1792c5d49619c2 3 csloyer 2022-09-22 15:14:50 kb_knowledge 587d1212db8d99501e1792c5d496192e H4sIAAAAAAAAAA== 16 0 2e19b292dbc699101e1792c5d49619c2 csloyer 2022-09-22 15:14:50 6e19b292dbc699101e1792c5d49619c2  12448 1 2e19b292dbc699101e1792c5d49619c2 csloyer 2022-09-22 15:14:50 ee19b292dbc699101e1792c5d49619c2 #efedef 700000 true image/png Pasted image.png a47f53c3df5e5ad03de5cd81790bb57a4c77b1e83711880cb0b698d7b9f9fb17 170 622 24156 23448 available csloyer 2022-09-22 15:14:50 aa19f292dbc699101e1792c5d49619f7 3 csloyer 2022-09-22 15:14:50 kb_knowledge 587d1212db8d99501e1792c5d496192e  22312 0 aa19f292dbc699101e1792c5d49619f7 csloyer 2022-09-22 15:14:50 ea19f292dbc699101e1792c5d49619f7  8956 1 aa19f292dbc699101e1792c5d49619f7 csloyer 2022-09-22 15:14:50 6e19f292dbc699101e1792c5d49619f7
